chunks.text: ie +353 868842852 Kinsale, Ireland MY SOCIAL MEDIA CHANNELS.

The most distracted environment of them all. Photography Coasts of Ireland As a photographer and kayaker, I combined the two into a site that sells prints and items for an international audience. Video Sea Kayak Around Ireland I directed, shot and edited an award winning documentary about a circumnavigation of Ireland via kayak. Illustration Character Designs I create various characters for mural and online projects. Don’t hesitate to contact me. cian@afterglow.

Education & Jobs 2019 - Present Product Designer (Contract) Citi Ventures | Remote, Ireland 2015 - Present Founder and Product Designer Marine User Experience | Cork, Ireland 2012 - 2015 Senior UX Designer Carma Carpooling | Cork, Ireland 2008 - 2012 Lead Visual Designer Cisco Systems | Galway, Ireland --> 2007- 2007 Visual Designer (Pro Applications) Apple Computer | Remote 2003 - 2007 Owner & Illustrator Afterglow Design | Dublin, Ireland 1998 - 2003 Graphic & Web Designer Various Companies | Dublin, Ireland Skills & Specialities User Experience Visual Design Web Design Illustration Hobbies & Interests Sea Kayaking Video Production International Concerts Portfolio A selection of projects Marine User Experience UX Consultancy Carma Visual & UX Design Cisco Visual Designer Afterglow Illustrator Side Projects Where curiosity goes to thrive Industrial Design Hands Free VHF Radio I'm working on a hands free VHF radio to improve the safety of communication at sea.
So their engagement with anything we create depends on those two factors.

I’m Cian Walsh An Irish based Product Designer with 20 years of experience About Cian It’s been my pleasure over two decades to create user experiences for clients spread across four continents. Different problems, but all battling issues of information overload. Technology can help us to filter this while leaving people to concentrate on their strengths. It's my conviction that emotion and environment play a huge part in people's retention of information.

# Cian Walsh
